field_values.scene_title: Introduce the supernatural element and transition to the next narrati...
field_values.action_summary: Carter's horse leads him to a large cave at the end of a cliffside trail. After checking Powell, Carter enters the cave to scout it, only to be overcome by an unnatural drowsiness that causes him to collapse.
field_values.camera_intent: Wide shots of the cliffside path; Tight close-ups on Carter's eyes/face as he loses consciousness; Slow; drifting camera movements to mimic dizziness.
movement_notes: Lighting transition (outdoor light to cave darkness)
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH001_SC005

- chapter_id: `CH001`
- scene_title: `Introduce the supernatural element and transition to the next narrati...`

## Production Intent

Introduce the supernatural element and transition to the next narrative phase.

## Storyboard

Carter's horse leads him to a large cave at the end of a cliffside trail. After checking Powell, Carter enters the cave to scout it, only to be overcome by an unnatural drowsiness that causes him to collapse.
